fields.acceptance_criteria: agent-server exposes create/start/pause/resume/stop over an atomic lifecycle state machine; websocket streams lifecycle events + incremental output; tokio broadcast fanout delivers identical streams to multiple observers; CORS configured for native+browser dev.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH6] Axum session lifecycle + websocket broadcast fanout
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-server. Primary: cargo test -p agent-server (lifecycle transitions, multi-observer identical fanout, no write deadlock). Manual: none. Failure logs: target/test-logs/.
